openQuestionsResolution.question: Exact question text from the planner's open questions.
openQuestionsResolution.resolution: How it was resolved and why. If deferred, explain why and to which phase.

edgeCasesFound: Edge case the tester should specifically exercise -- discovered during implementation.
knownLimitations: Deliberate choice or non-obvious constraint baked into this implementation.
deferredItems: Work explicitly out of scope for this phase. Do not test for these.
